news.title: World Cup final kick-off time delayed by performances and bizarre Tom Cruise speech
news.lede: The World Cup final between Argentina and Spain started six minutes late. From reproductive rights to climate change to Big Tech, The Independent is on the ground when the story is developing. Whether it's investigating the financials of Elon Musk's pro-Trump PAC or producing our latest documentary, 'The A Word', which shines a light on the American women fighting for reproductive rights, we know how important it is to parse out the facts from the messaging. At such a critical moment in US history, we need reporters on the ground.

news.title: Donald Trump arrives by helicopter to attend World Cup final alongside Gianni Infantino
news.lede: US president watches Spain v Argentina match. Trump avoids hostile reception from crowd. World Cup final: live coverage of the match. Donald Trump took his place at the World Cup final at the New York New Jersey Stadium on Sunday.

news.title: President Donald Trump attends World Cup final in New Jersey
news.lede: Editor's note: Follow for live updates on Argentina-Spain World Cup final. President Donald Trump was in attendance at the World Cup final on Sunday, July 19, making his first appearance at the 2026 tournament for its final match. Argentina faces Spain in the final at MetLife Stadium in East Rutherford, New Jersey, with a number of celebrities and dignitaries in the building. Ahead of kickoff, Trump was seen with First Lady Melania Trump, FIFA President Gianni Infantino, Mexico's President Claudia Sheinbaum, Canada's Prime Minister Mark Carney, Spain's King Felipe VI and Queen Letizia, Spain's Prime Minister Pedro Sanchez and Spain's Football Federation President Rafael Louzán.

news.title: Everything we know about the World Cup final referee confirmed for Spain vs. Argentina
news.lede: Reaching a World Cup Final is the pinnacle for any football player, but that extends to the officials too. FIFA assembled the 52 best referees, 88 assistants and 30 specialists VARs, from all across the globe, to come together for this tournament, all of whom are aspiring to be chosen to take charge of the final. Well, that honor has been bestowed upon Slavko Vinčić. He is a 46 year old Slovenian, who has been FIFA listed since 2010, so ahead of the biggest match of his long career, what more do we know about him and his team?

news.title: All The Celebrities Spotted At 2026 FIFA World Cup Final Match
news.lede: The 2026 FIFA World Cup Final between Argentina and Spain at MetLife Stadium transcended a mere sporting event, becoming a colossal entertainment spectacle. For the first time, the final featured a star-studded Halftime Show, curated by Chris Martin, with global icons like Madonna, Shakira, Justin Bieber, and BTS performing to support the FIFA Global Citizen Education Fund. The closing ceremony also boasted performances from Jennifer Hudson, Post Malone, and Robbie Williams. Beyond the stage, a dazzling array of celebrities, including actors, musicians, and political figures, flocked to New Jersey, transforming the championship into an unprecedented cultural and social gathering.

news.title: FIFA to examine possibility of expanding men’s World Cup to 64 teams, Infantino says
news.lede: FIFA President Gianni Infantino has confirmed that world football’s governing body will examine the possibility of expanding the men’s FIFA World Cup to 64 teams after the conclusion of the 2026 tournament, ESPN reported, citing comments made by the FIFA chief to Swiss broadcaster Blue Sport. Speaking to Blue Sport, Infantino said the proposal would be discussed by FIFA’s relevant committees once the ongoing World Cup concludes. “This is certainly an issue that will be looked at and discussed in the relevant committees after this World Cup,” Infantino said. “When you organize a World Cup, it’s important that you organize it for the whole world.

news.title: President Donald Trump arrives at MetLife Stadium for World Cup final
news.lede: President Donald Trump has arrived at the World Cup final in East Rutherford. The president departed his Trump National Golf Club in Bedminster on July 19 via the Marine One helicopter for the journey to the Meadowlands. Trump and First Lady Melania Trump are in a luxury box with FIFA President Gianni Infantino at MetLife Stadium, being called New York/New Jersey Stadium. Also, in the booth are Mexican President Claudia Sheinbaum, Canada's Prime Minister Mark Carney and Spain's Queen Letizia.

news.title: 2026 World Cup: All the European sides' fixtures and results
news.lede: Keep track of all the European sides' fixtures and results at the World Cup in Canada, Mexico and the United States. The 2026 FIFA World Cup in Canada, Mexico and the United States kicked off on 11 June and concludes with the final between Spain and holders Argentina in East Rutherford on 19 July. Check out all the details of the European teams' matches. Monday 15 June: D 0-0 vs Cabo Verde (Atlanta) Sunday 21 June: W 4-0 vs Saudi Arabia (Atlanta) Saturday 27 June: W 1-0 vs Uruguay (Guadalajara) Thursday 2 July (R32): W 3-0 vs Austria (Los Angeles) Monday 6 July (R16): W 1-0 vs Portugal (Dallas) Friday 10 July (QF): W 2-1 vs Belgium (Los Angeles) Tuesday 14 July (SF): W 2-0 vs France (Dallas) Sunday 19 July (F): vs Argentina (New York, 21:00).
